name: My Favorite Ice Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg, vanilla, and chopped walnuts; beat until well combined.
3. Gradually add sifted flour.
4. Form the mixture into one or two rolls and refrigerate.
5. When ready to bake, slice into pieces about half the size of a dollar bill.
6. Bake at 350°F for 4 minutes, checking closely as they can burn quickly.
7. Allow cooling for 30 seconds before removing from the cookie sheet.
